CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.25)(value, weight) FROM test_data WHERE weight > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_data_empty (id UInt32, value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.9)(value, weight) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data) AS subquery;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.75)(value, weight) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data WHERE id % 2 = 0) AS subquery;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.1)(value, weight) FROM test_data WHERE weight > 0;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.99)(value, weight) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data WHERE id < 5) AS subquery;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.5)(value, weight) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data) GROUP BY weight;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.5)(value, 1) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS weight, AVG(value) AS value FROM test_data GROUP BY id) AS avg_data;
CREATE TABLE test_data_with_datetime (id UInt32, event_time DateTime, value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.5)(value, weight) FROM test_data_with_datetime WHERE event_time >= '2023-01-01' AND event_time < '2023-01-03';
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.5)(value, weight) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data_with_datetime WHERE weight > 0) AS subquery;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.85)(value, weight) FROM test_data JOIN test_data_with_datetime ON test_data.id = test_data_with_datetime.id WHERE test_data.value > 15;
